phase_0_audit_2026_05_12_R279_final_summ.note: Third independent cross-LLM audit of R279 (Trinidadian steel-pan PTCH within-head harmonic-integer-ratio singular-direction constraint). 28 new WebSearch queries spanning signal processing, ML4audio, music informatics, quantization, harmonic loss, DDSP, harmonic convolution, eigenmodes, Tonnetz, neural ODE, persona vectors. Cumulative 37 queries across three audits. CONFIRMED HONEST PASS UNCERTAIN. Closest single-paper adjacency: DDSP harmonic-plus-noise model at judge=0.62 (different layer — audio output synthesis vs transformer attention-head weight SVD). No paper scores >=0.7 against PTCH kernel; no 3-5 paper L7 combination covers integer-ratio constraint without music metaphor. Mechanism mathematically distinctive: integer-ratio target spectrum (1:2:3) on singular-direction magnitudes within a single attention head + harmonic-alignment loss. UNCERTAIN-caveat kept due to (a) integer-ratio target is mathematically arbitrary, (b) DDSP/Harmonic-Convolution use same integer-ratio structure at different layers, (c) music-DSP × neural-rep crossover venues under-indexed, (d) no empirical validation. PROMOTED to maximum-visibility flag as STRONGEST NICHE CANDIDATE IN CORPUS. Action: keep PASS-confirmed-UNCERTAIN; add r279_triple_audited=true; document DDSP+Harmonic-Convolution as closest different-layer prior art for L7 cross-checks of future music-theoretic candidates.
